empty_products: No products yet — add your first product to get started.
backbar_subtitle: Track professional-use product per service to capture cost-per-service.
scan_hint: Point at the product barcode, then type the matched product name below. (Barcode decoding can be wired to a scanner library later.)
scan_err_unavailable: Camera not available. Type the product name instead.
scan_err_denied: Camera permission denied. Enable it in browser settings or type the product name.
scan_err_notfound: No camera found. Type the product name instead.
scan_err_generic: Could not start camera. Type the product name instead.
